title: Port of Moldova Veche
summary: The Port of Moldova Veche is one of the largest Romanian river ports, located in the town of Moldova Nouă on the Danube River. The port has 6 berths with a total quay length of 560 metres (1,840 ft) and two terminals, one for cargo and one passenger terminal. Located on the Danube's left bank, it straddles kilometers 1047 through 1050 of the river's course. It is mainly used for handling wood products, sand and gravel, bricks and fertilizers.
text: The Port of Moldova Veche is one of the largest Romanian river ports, located in the town of Moldova Nouă on the Danube River.
